title: neoregelia
intro: Neoregelia is a genus of tropical plants in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family, and is native to the Americas. It is a type of air plant that stores water in its leaf rosettes, allowing it to thrive in environments with low water availability. The medicinal properties of Neoregelia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neoregelia include reducing stress and anxiety, and it can be consumed as a herbal tea or used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
